# Huawei New-Gen OceanStor

# A800 High-Performance AI Storage

![Isometric AI Head with Cloud-Integrated Server Stacks and Distributed Storage Nodes](/system/doc-content/9fcaed74-cbfb-40d4-b2e3-012b6539fcc1/images/f54e9dc0f77e66ec199f5cb5faca1deeafa1f21e7345aea4186feb8cb5101fe3.jpg)

> <IMAGE_CONTEXTUAL_DESCRIPTION> The image uses an isometric illustration to visually represent the core concepts of the Huawei OceanStor A800 AI storage solution. At the center, a stylized AI head symbolizes the AI workloads (training/inference) the storage is designed to support. Inside the head, cloud-based server stacks represent the storage infrastructure, while the surrounding distributed nodes (servers, microchips) illustrate the system's scalability—aligning with the document's claim of scaling to 512 controllers. The visual emphasis on 'AI Native' is reinforced by the central AI head, and the cloud/server stacks inside the head directly map to the document's description of the data and control plane separation architecture, which enables ultra performance. The distributed node layout visually communicates the flexible, expandable nature of the storage system, supporting the document's focus on EB-level capacity for large multimodal models. </IMAGE_CONTEXTUAL_DESCRIPTION>

![Huawei OceanStor A800 high-performance AI storage system unit for large-scale AI workloads](/system/doc-content/9fcaed74-cbfb-40d4-b2e3-012b6539fcc1/images/ec9fda9dfc10582189fd47952b567818df8bbd4f4b2d779b6374d8ead1971618.jpg)

> <IMAGE_CONTEXTUAL_DESCRIPTION> The image depicts the physical hardware enclosure of the Huawei OceanStor A800, a high-performance distributed storage system. This visual directly supports the document's focus on the A800 as a tangible solution for AI workloads, aligning with claims of ultra performance, AI-native capabilities, and scalability. The server's robust design (e.g., ventilation grilles, Huawei branding) reinforces its role as an enterprise-grade storage solution for large-scale AI model training and inference, as detailed in the text. The image bridges the gap between the textual description of the A800's architecture and performance metrics (e.g., 500 GB/s bandwidth, 10 million IOPS) and the actual product, validating the document's emphasis on the A800's hardware foundation for AI-native operations. </IMAGE_CONTEXTUAL_DESCRIPTION>

Ultra Performance

- Omni-Expansion   
  AI Native

  Huawei OceanStor A800 is the new-gen high-performance distributed storage designed for AI. Its innovative data and control plane separation architecture enables ultra performance and accelerates large AI model training and inference. OceanStor A800 offers 500 GB/s bandwidth and 10 million IOPS per controller enclosure, 4x faster training set loading, and 3x faster training resumption from checkpoints than the leading alternative.

  Huawei OceanStor A800 high-performance AI storage also supports flexible scalability, with a single cluster able to scale out to 512 controllers and EB-level storage capacity expansion needed for the smooth evolution of multimodal models with trillions or tens of trillions of parameters. OceanStor A800 supports new data paradigms, like vectors, with its built-in high-performance vector retrieval engine that accelerates retrieval from large-capacity vector knowledge bases and reduces AI hallucinations. It also provides multi-level KV cache to reduce inference latency while improving cost-effectiveness. This enables a single storage system to meet the data processing needs of the entire AI training and inference process.

  ![Huawei OceanStor A800 High-Performance AI Distributed All-Flash Storage Array](/system/doc-content/9fcaed74-cbfb-40d4-b2e3-012b6539fcc1/images/6ae92df95a11224e43711315c04182ce92490a49a708b71076783f85a87caf4c.jpg)

> <IMAGE_CONTEXTUAL_DESCRIPTION> The image depicts a large, modular, all-flash storage array with Huawei branding, visually representing the OceanStor A800 system described in the document. This physical configuration aligns with the document’s emphasis on distributed architecture, as the array’s modular design (multiple interconnected units) supports the claim of flexible scalability to 512 controllers. The extensive, uniform structure illustrates the system’s capacity for EB-level storage expansion, essential for handling multimodal AI models with trillions of parameters. The high-density, industrial design also reflects the 'ultra performance' capabilities highlighted, such as 500 GB/s bandwidth and 10 million IOPS, by visually conveying the system’s robust, high-throughput infrastructure tailored for AI training and inference workloads. The array’s scale and modular nature directly support the document’s focus on scalable, high-performance AI storage for large-scale model development. </IMAGE_CONTEXTUAL_DESCRIPTION>  
> OceanStor A800 high-performance AI storage

# Product Introduction

- OceanStor A800 is an all-flash high-performance AI storage product that delivers excellent performance, high capacity, and elastic scalability based on brand-new hardware. It integrates disks and controllers, with each controller enclosure supporting 64 high-speed NVMe SSDs and providing raw capacity ranging from 245.76 TB to 983.04 TB. With ultimate scalability, a single cluster can scale out to 512 controllers, reaching EB-level capacity.
- Based on the brand-new data and control plane separation architecture, OceanStor A800 high-performance AI storage provides up to 500 GB/s bandwidth and 10 million IOPS. A single storage system accelerates the entire AI process, from data ingestion to training and inference. OceanStor A800 is widely applicable to financial AI models, regional intelligent computing centers, AI computing power centers, scientific research platforms, autonomous driving platforms, and more.

# Product Features

# $\triangleleft$ Ultra Performance for Higher AI Cluster Computing Power Utilization

OceanStor A800 uses NPUDirect Storage (NDS) to build an optimal performance path from NPUs to data storage, bypassing complex protocol stacks and eliminating the need for data copy, improving performance by $40\%$ .

New-gen OceanStor A800 AI storage uses the DataTurbo high-performance file acceleration engine to directly read data from and write data to the storage system in kernel mode. Kernel-mode caching enables memory data mobility and halves memory usage. OceanStor A800 offers 500 GB/s bandwidth per controller enclosure, over 100 TB/s aggregated bandwidth per cluster, read and write for TB-level checkpoints in seconds when training models with trillions of parameters, and fast resumable training from checkpoints.

Based on a global unified data view, OceanStor A800 uses DPUs to offload the general computing power of CPUs. Data read and write operations are processed by DPUs, bypassing the CPUs and memory. The host can thus directly connect to disks to read and write data. A single controller enclosure provides 10 million IOPS and a cluster provides hundreds of millions of IOPS, with four times higher data loading efficiency than the leading alternative.

# $\triangleleft$ More Flexible Multi-Dimensional Expansion

Based on the brand-new hardware architecture, new-gen OceanStor A800 AI storage delivers flexible scalability with both scale-out and scale-up capabilities. A single cluster can scale out to up to 512 controllers and EB-level storage capacity, ensuring high performance and capacity density. In addition, computing cards, such as DPU and GPU accelerator cards*, can be inserted into the back end of the array. The storage cluster can scale up to a maximum of 4,096 cards, together to provide 14,400 TFLOPS of computing power and accelerate data processing. It can also carry multiple offloaded functions, including encryption, compression, and vector retrieval.

A single new-gen OceanStor A800 AI storage system can meet diverse ecosystem requirements. It is compatible with file, object, and vector, among other protocols, and supports the entire large AI model development process, such as data ingestion, preprocessing, model training, and deployment and inference. OceanStor A800 eliminates the need for data copy and accelerates the iteration and development of large AI models.

New-gen OceanStor A800 AI storage provides SmartQuota. With this file system quota technology, system administrators can manage and control the storage resources. By limiting the disk space that can be used by specified subjects, SmartQuota prevents excessive resource occupation and maximizes the value of storage space.

# $\triangleleft$ More Efficient Inference with AI-Native Data Paradigms

The data paradigms supported by new-gen OceanStor A800 AI storage range from NAS, and objects to new vectors and graph adaptive retrieval engines. OceanStor A800 enables high-performance retrieval from massive amounts of multimodal knowledge. The solution's competitive advantage lies in its inference based on RAG knowledge bases and Unified Cache. OceanStor A800 provides a built-in large-capacity AI knowledge base with hundreds of millions of data records for 3x higher QPS than the leading alternative. This enables faster knowledge base creation and more accurate queries.

OceanStor A800 significantly accelerates inference thanks to its Unified Cache feature, which offers multi-level KV cache from on-chip memory to SSDs. This establishes a PB-level global shared resource pool for KV cache, enabling flexible allocation across multiple compute nodes and xPUs and eliminating repeated computing. This slashes the Time to First Token (TTFT) by $78\%$ while improving the throughput by $60\%$ . It also uses sparse attention algorithms for retrieval to compress tokens to enable the inference of ultra-long sequences beyond the context window, ultimately making inference smoother, faster, and more cost-effective.

Key Specifications

ModelOceanStor A800
Hardware ArchitectureDisk and controller integration
Maximum Raw Capacity per Controller Enclosure983.04 TB
Height of Each Controller Enclosure8 U
Controllers per Controller Enclosure2
Disks per Controller Enclosure64
Processors per ControllerFour Kunpeng 920 processors
Maximum Memory per Controller1024 GB
Data Disk TypePalm-sized NVMe SSD
Network Type25/100 Gbit/s TCP/IP25/100/200 Gbit/s RoCE200 Gbit/s InfiniBand
Key FeatureCluster (HyperScale), quota (SmartQuota), Quality of Service (SmartQoS), multi-protocol interworking (SmartInterworking)*, end-to-end data integrity check (DIF)
Enclosure Dimensions (H x W x D)352.8 mm × 447 mm × 952.2 mm
Operating Temperature-60 m to +1800 m altitude: 5°C to 35°C1800 m to 3000 m altitude: The max. temperature threshold decreases by 1°C for every altitude increase of 220 m
Operating Humidity10% to 90% RH
* If this feature is required, contact the sales personnel.
